design_concept: Apple-style landing page. Hyper-minimalist, high-contrast monochrome with a focus on premium typography, generous negative space, and high-quality imagery. The emotional tone is authoritative, clean, and appetizing.

typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-[#1D1D1F]

components.button_primary: bg-[#1D1D1F] hover:bg-[#333336] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-colors duration-300
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F5F5F7] hover:bg-[#E8E8ED] text-[#1D1D1F] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-colors duration-300

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Centered massive typography over subtle off-white background. The text should sit above a massive rounded-[2rem] hero image container.
sections.instructions: Use H1 for 'Welcome to Jolly's Kafe'. Subtitle in text-secondary. Two pill buttons (Primary and Secondary). Add Framer Motion stagger for entrance. The hero image (/background.jpg) should be large, edge-to-edge or max-w-7xl with rounded-[2rem] and smooth parallax or subtle zoom-in.

sections.name: Menu Preview
sections.instructions: Use CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6). Cards should use the 'solid_card' surface. Images (/item-menu-1.jpg etc.) should fill the card backgrounds completely (object-cover), and food titles should be placed inside a small glassmorphism pill at the bottom left of each card.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.instructions: Use lucide-react icons (ChefHat, Leaf, Clock, Heart). Icons should be black, large, stroke-width 1.5. No cards—just pure text and icon floating on the off-white background with generous spacing.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.instructions: Use massive text for quotes (e.g. 'The best roast in Manchester.') with author name below in secondary text. Keep it extremely minimal. No borders, just pure white/off-white background.

sections.name: Newsletter & Footer
sections.layout: Centred form inside a soft gray rounded-[2rem] box.
sections.instructions: Input should have no visible border, just bg-white inside the gray container. Button is a solid black pill. Footer links should be arranged in clean Apple-style columns with secondary text colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Outfit' font is loaded from Google Fonts in index.html for headings. Example: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
Remove any existing purple gradients or floating emojis. The page must be strictly Apple-like: #FBFBFD background, pure white cards, #1D1D1F text.
Make heavy use of framer-motion for smooth, slow 'fade-up' and 'scale' animations as elements come into view.
Images MUST use the provided paths (e.g., /item-menu-1.jpg, /background.jpg). Ensure they have rounded-[2rem] corners where appropriate. Use object-cover to make them look premium.
Apply `data-testid` attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs) for testing purposes.
